package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for tests_stub_gin_context_instead_of_httptest_boundary: Handler tests that mock Gin internals directly instead of using `httptest` when boundary behavior matters.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule204NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule204NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule204NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario204Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule204NegativeService, input Rule204NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
